plan_metadata.title: Phase 2 Warning Remediation Plan
plan_metadata.scope: Eliminate the 56 Phase 2 packet-generation warnings without weakening stale-file gates or corrupting canonical file-module mappings.
plan_metadata.governing_rule: Context packets may add routing metadata and derived file-scope rules, but they must not rewrite canonical ownership semantics from module_catalog.json or file_module_mapping.csv.

root_causes.title: Test files were emitted as Phase 1 source-file candidates
root_causes.description: Several work cells inherited test files in source_files. Phase 2 correctly filtered them because allowed_files/source_files are checked against non-test implementation mappings, while tests belong in test_files.
root_causes.fix_strategy: Move these paths out of submodule_context_catalog.work_cells[*].source_files and into test_files. Regenerate Phase 2 packets so source_files and allowed_files contain only implementation files, while test_files carries mapped test paths.

root_causes.title: UI implementation files were attached to SHARED_LIBS proxy parent
root_causes.description: UI work cells were parented to SHARED_LIBS only because module_catalog.json has no dedicated UI module. Phase 1 carried UI implementation files in source_files, but file_module_mapping.csv intentionally does not map dashboard-backend, desktop-ui, or gui-gateway files to SHARED_LIBS.
root_causes.fix_strategy: Do not map UI files to SHARED_LIBS. Add explicit UI service-scope metadata to UI work cells and Phase 2 packets. Keep SHARED_LIBS as the canonical parent proxy, but resolve UI allowed files by service binding rather than parent_module_symbol.

records.purpose: Add optional properties used by regenerated catalog entries: file_scope_resolution, service_scope, and candidate_file_classification.
Increment catalog version to 1.0.2, remove test paths from source_files, add them to test_files, and add UI service-scope metadata for UI work cells.
Add optional service_scope and file_scope_resolution fields to module packets and work-cell context packets.
Regenerate all module context packets and work-cell context files from the remediated catalog and unchanged canonical references.
Regenerate packet validation report with warning_count == 0 and all Phase 2 gates PASS.
Confirm CA-001 through CA-009 hashes remain unchanged.
Record warning_count == 0, packet counts, and PASS gate statuses.
Record exact remediation actions, before/after warning counts, and validation gate results.

STEP-WR01.purpose: Baseline current warning report and authoritative artifact hashes.

STEP-WR02.purpose: Classify Phase 1 candidate files into implementation source files, test files, and UI service-scope files.

STEP-WR03.purpose: Update schema files to permit explicit file-scope metadata while keeping existing required fields stable.

STEP-WR04.purpose: Remediate submodule_context_catalog.json: move test paths into test_files and add UI service-scope metadata.

STEP-WR05.purpose: Regenerate Phase 2 context packets from the remediated catalog.

STEP-WR06.purpose: Regenerate evidence reports and verify warning_count == 0.

validation_gates.GATE-WR-BASELINE-001: Baseline report records exactly 56 warnings: 13 SOURCE-CANDIDATES-FILTERED and 43 WORK-CELL-SOURCE-CANDIDATES-FILTERED.
validation_gates.GATE-WR-CLASSIFY-001: Every warning path is classified as either mapped test file or UI service-scope file. No unknown path remains.
validation_gates.GATE-WR-SCHEMA-001: Both JSON schemas validate as Draft 2020-12 and accept the new optional file-scope metadata fields.
validation_gates.GATE-WR-CATALOG-001: submodule_context_catalog.json validates against submodule_catalog_schema.json after remediation.
validation_gates.GATE-WR-NO-TEST-SOURCES-001: No work_cell.source_files entry contains '\\tests\\' or has IsTest == 1 in file_module_mapping.csv.
validation_gates.GATE-WR-UI-SCOPE-001: All ui_screen and ui_gateway work cells have file_scope_resolution == service_scope and service_scope includes dashboard-backend, desktop-ui, and gui-gateway.
validation_gates.GATE-WR-PACKET-FILE-SCOPE-001: For canonical module packets, allowed_files are subsets of file_module_mapping.csv by CanonicalModules. For UI service-scope packets, allowed_files are subsets of file_module_mapping.csv rows where Service is dashboard-backend, desktop-ui, or gui-gateway.
validation_gates.GATE-WR-ZERO-WARNINGS-001: Regenerated packet_validation_report.json has warning_count == 0 and warnings == [].
validation_gates.GATE-WR-NOOVERRIDE-001: CA-001 through CA-009 hashes match the Phase 1 baseline.
validation_gates.GATE-WR-SUMMARY-001: remediation_summary.json records before_warning_count == 56, after_warning_count == 0, and overall_status == PASS.

anti_pattern_detection.name: mapping_pollution
anti_pattern_detection.trigger: file_module_mapping.csv is edited to map UI files to SHARED_LIBS only to satisfy stale-file checks.
anti_pattern_detection.action: halt; use UI service-scope metadata instead.

anti_pattern_detection.name: test_files_as_sources
anti_pattern_detection.trigger: Any IsTest == 1 path appears in source_files or allowed_files.

anti_pattern_detection.name: warning_suppression_without_resolution
anti_pattern_detection.trigger: Packet generator suppresses warnings without proving file-scope validity.

anti_pattern_detection.name: authoritative_artifact_modified
anti_pattern_detection.trigger: Any CA-001 through CA-009 hash differs from the Phase 1 baseline.
anti_pattern_detection.action: halt; restore the authoritative artifact and restart remediation.

definition_of_done: The warning report contains zero warnings.
All Phase 2 packet JSON artifacts validate against context_packet_schema.json.
No implementation source packet includes test files in source_files or allowed_files.
UI work cells retain SHARED_LIBS parent_module but resolve files through explicit service_scope metadata.
GATE-WR-NOOVERRIDE-001 passes for CA-001 through CA-009.
recommended_execution_note: This plan should be executed before Phase 3. Phase 3 depends on context packet file scopes, so eliminating these warnings avoids ambiguous or incomplete edit boundaries.
